name: Cold Chocolate Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Mix the cookie crumbs with sugar and cocoa powder in a bowl.
3. Add the melted butter to the dry ingredients.
4. Stir until well combined.
5. Press the mixture into a 26 cm springform pan.
6. Refrigerate.
Filling:
1. Melt chocolate using a double boiler or microwave, stirring until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; set aside.
4. Whip cream to soft peaks; set aside.
5. Whisk egg yolks with sugar until fluffy.
6. Whisk cream cheese until fluffy; add the egg yolk mixture and melted chocolate, stirring until fully combined.
7. Fold in whipped cream until smooth.
8. Gently fold in beaten egg whites until incorporated.
9. Pour filling over the crust.
10. Sprinkle chopped pecan nuts on top (optional).
11. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, preferably overnight.
